title: Mudopterist
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''mudopterist''' studied [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Insect/Legends|insects]]. On [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Elana Divini]], the mother of [[Kornell Divini]], was a notable mudopterist.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
